queries.natural_language: List Low Grade, FRPM Count (Ages 5-17), High Grade from frpm where Low Grade equals '9'.
queries.sql: SELECT "low_grade", "frpm_count_ages_5_17", "high_grade" FROM "frpm" WHERE ("low_grade" = '9');

queries.natural_language: List cname, dname, AvgScrRead from satscores where cname contains 'alameda'.
queries.sql: SELECT "cname", "dname", "avg_scr_read" FROM "satscores" WHERE (LOWER(CAST("cname" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%alameda%');
result_rows: SBE - Livermore Valley Charter Preparatory High

queries.natural_language: List cname, dname, NumTstTakr from satscores where cname equals 'Alameda'.
queries.sql: SELECT "cname", "dname", "num_tst_takr" FROM "satscores" WHERE ("cname" = 'Alameda');
result_rows: SBE - Livermore Valley Charter Preparatory High

queries.natural_language: List NSLP Provision Status, Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17), FRPM Count (Ages 5-17) from frpm where NSLP Provision Status is not null.
queries.sql: SELECT "nslp_provision_status", "percent_eligible_frpm_ages_5_17", "frpm_count_ages_5_17" FROM "frpm" WHERE ("nslp_provision_status" IS NOT NULL);

queries.natural_language: List County Name, District Name, School Type from frpm where County Name equals 'Butte'.
queries.sql: SELECT "county_name", "district_name", "school_type" FROM "frpm" WHERE ("county_name" = 'Butte');

queries.natural_language: List dname, enroll12, AvgScrMath from satscores where dname contains 'union'.
queries.sql: SELECT "dname", "enroll12", "avg_scr_math" FROM "satscores" WHERE (LOWER(CAST("dname" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%union%');

queries.natural_language: List County Name, Charter School Number, District Type from frpm where County Name contains 'butte'.
queries.sql: SELECT "county_name", "charter_school_number", "district_type" FROM "frpm" WHERE (LOWER(CAST("county_name" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%butte%');

queries.natural_language: List School Type, Low Grade, District Type from frpm where School Type contains 'high'.
queries.sql: SELECT "school_type", "low_grade", "district_type" FROM "frpm" WHERE (LOWER(CAST("school_type" AS TEXT)) LIKE '%high%');

queries.natural_language: Find enroll12, AvgScrMath, NumTstTakr from satscores where enroll12 is between 77 and 346 and row_id is <= 249.
queries.sql: SELECT "enroll12", "avg_scr_math", "num_tst_takr" FROM "satscores" WHERE (CAST("enroll12" AS REAL) >= 77 AND CAST("enroll12" AS REAL) <= 346) AND (CAST("row_id" AS REAL) <= 249);

queries.natural_language: Find Low Grade, FRPM Count (K-12), row_id from frpm where Low Grade equals '9' and High Grade is >= 12.
queries.sql: SELECT "low_grade", "frpm_count_k_12", "row_id" FROM "frpm" WHERE ("low_grade" = '9') AND (CAST("high_grade" AS REAL) >= 12);

queries.natural_language: Find NumGE1500, row_id, enroll12 from satscores where NumGE1500 is <= 17 and AvgScrMath is <= 473.
queries.sql: SELECT "num_ge1500", "row_id", "enroll12" FROM "satscores" WHERE (CAST("num_ge1500" AS REAL) <= 17) AND (CAST("avg_scr_math" AS REAL) <= 473);

queries.natural_language: Find NumGE1500, sname, NumTstTakr from satscores where NumGE1500 is between 17 and 70 and AvgScrWrite is >= 449.
queries.sql: SELECT "num_ge1500", "sname", "num_tst_takr" FROM "satscores" WHERE (CAST("num_ge1500" AS REAL) >= 17 AND CAST("num_ge1500" AS REAL) <= 70) AND (CAST("avg_scr_write" AS REAL) >= 449);
result_rows: Northcoast Preparatory and Performing Arts Academy
Inspire School of Arts and Sciences

queries.natural_language: Find Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (K-12), Charter School Number, Charter School (Y/N) from frpm where Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (K-12) is >= 0.833333 and Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12) is >= 0.767857.
queries.sql: SELECT "percent_eligible_frpm_k_12", "charter_school_number", "charter_school_y_n" FROM "frpm" WHERE (CAST("percent_eligible_frpm_k_12" AS REAL) >= 0.833333) AND (CAST("percent_eligible_free_k_12" AS REAL) >= 0.767857);

queries.natural_language: Find Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17), Charter School (Y/N), Enrollment (K-12) from frpm where Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17) is >= 0.833741 and Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12) is >= 0.767857.
queries.sql: SELECT "percent_eligible_frpm_ages_5_17", "charter_school_y_n", "enrollment_k_12" FROM "frpm" WHERE (CAST("percent_eligible_frpm_ages_5_17" AS REAL) >= 0.833741) AND (CAST("percent_eligible_free_k_12" AS REAL) >= 0.767857);

queries.natural_language: Find AvgScrRead, AvgScrMath, enroll12 from satscores where AvgScrRead is <= 460 and NumGE1500 is between 10 and 124.
queries.sql: SELECT "avg_scr_read", "avg_scr_math", "enroll12" FROM "satscores" WHERE (CAST("avg_scr_read" AS REAL) <= 460) AND (CAST("num_ge1500" AS REAL) >= 10 AND CAST("num_ge1500" AS REAL) <= 124);

queries.natural_language: Find FRPM Count (Ages 5-17), NSLP Provision Status, Enrollment (K-12) from frpm where FRPM Count (Ages 5-17) is <= 50 and Free Meal Count (K-12) is <= 43.
queries.sql: SELECT "frpm_count_ages_5_17", "nslp_provision_status", "enrollment_k_12" FROM "frpm" WHERE (CAST("frpm_count_ages_5_17" AS REAL) <= 50) AND (CAST("free_meal_count_k_12" AS REAL) <= 43);

queries.natural_language: Find NumGE1500, enroll12, rtype from satscores where NumGE1500 is <= 33, AvgScrMath is >= 446, and AvgScrRead is >= 427.
queries.sql: SELECT "num_ge1500", "enroll12", "rtype" FROM "satscores" WHERE (CAST("num_ge1500" AS REAL) <= 33) AND (CAST("avg_scr_math" AS REAL) >= 446) AND (CAST("avg_scr_read" AS REAL) >= 427);

queries.natural_language: Find AvgScrWrite, cname, sname from satscores where AvgScrWrite is between 425 and 514, NumGE1500 is >= 17, and row_id is >= 249.
queries.sql: SELECT "avg_scr_write", "cname", "sname" FROM "satscores" WHERE (CAST("avg_scr_write" AS REAL) >= 425 AND CAST("avg_scr_write" AS REAL) <= 514) AND (CAST("num_ge1500" AS REAL) >= 17) AND (CAST("row_id" AS REAL) >= 249);

queries.natural_language: Find NumGE1500, dname, NumTstTakr from satscores where NumGE1500 is between 17 and 70, enroll12 is between 77 and 346, and NumGE1500 is between 10 and 124.
queries.sql: SELECT "num_ge1500", "dname", "num_tst_takr" FROM "satscores" WHERE (CAST("num_ge1500" AS REAL) >= 17 AND CAST("num_ge1500" AS REAL) <= 70) AND (CAST("enroll12" AS REAL) >= 77 AND CAST("enroll12" AS REAL) <= 346) AND (CAST("num_ge1500" AS REAL) >= 10 AND CAST("num_ge1500" AS REAL) <= 124);
result_rows: Contra Costa County Office of Education
Los Angeles County Office of Education
SBE - Livermore Valley Charter Preparatory High

queries.natural_language: Find NumGE1500, enroll12, row_id from satscores where NumGE1500 is between 17 and 70, AvgScrRead is between 427 and 528, and NumTstTakr is >= 62.
queries.sql: SELECT "num_ge1500", "enroll12", "row_id" FROM "satscores" WHERE (CAST("num_ge1500" AS REAL) >= 17 AND CAST("num_ge1500" AS REAL) <= 70) AND (CAST("avg_scr_read" AS REAL) >= 427 AND CAST("avg_scr_read" AS REAL) <= 528) AND (CAST("num_tst_takr" AS REAL) >= 62);
